subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 737133200/240511634 is not a GRB
body:
L. Scotton (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 737133200/240511634 at 15:13:15.95 UT
on 11 May 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to local particles."
